title: Normal employee
description: What sensitive data can a normal employee reach through everyday permissions, broad groups, and sharing links?

title: Contractor / guest
description: What can a contractor or external guest still reach, including access that should have expired?

title: Broad sharing
description: Which sensitive resources are exposed through organization-wide links or large department groups?

title: Sensitive file
description: Which high-sensitivity files (HR, legal, finance, board, security) are reachable beyond their intended audience?

title: Agent action
description: Which Copilot Studio-style agents can take risky actions or run under unsafe ownership and permissions?
